text: Iraq: The commander of the Communist-controlled Popular Resistance Forces in southern Iraq has begun to assert himself. issued a proclamation to the inhabitants of Basra calling for special efforts against "outcast agents, saboteurs, and people bearing grudges." The forced retirement from Iraq's armed forces of a large number of senior officers on 19 and 26 April will further weaken the army's ability to prevent increasing independence of action by Popular Resistance Forces throughout the country
